text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaahhh!

Despite it being the weekend, Special Week is
doing laps at full sprint.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've got a very, very important task today, so I'm preparing for it right now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I have an idea! Could you come along and cheer
me on?

I have no idea what's waiting for me, but I decide
to join Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Here we are! This is where my big battle is taking
place!

For some reason, there's a long table set up in
front of a restaurant with an old couple standing
next to it.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
We've been waiting for you, Spe! Everything's
ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: We're counting on you today, dearie.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll do my best! I hope I don't let you down! Now,
let's get right to it.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Come on, hun! Let's bring it all
out!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: Yes, dear! Here you go, Spe. Eat up, now!

The old couple piles on the dishes one after the
other.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, I agreed to help advertise this lovely
couple's restaurant!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
They always cook up lots of delicious meals for
me, so I wanted to return the favor.

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
We came up with this idea since Spe always looks
so happy when she eats our food.

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
We thought it would be good publicity if people
saw her eating up a storm in front of our
restaurant!
choice_data_list: So you were running to work up an appetite...
So you were running to work up an appetite...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm gonna eat a whole lot today to show
everyone just how delicious the food at this
restaurant is!

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and come see for yourself! This
deary from Tracen Academy has put in the order
of a century!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: She says she'll finish everything on our menu!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow, this looks real tasty! I can't wait to dig in!

The booming voices of the couple and Special
Week, as well as the food's delicious aroma,
attract plenty of curious onlookers.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...I'll finish everything—no matter what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Do you have any advice?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Got it! That's something I'm confident I can do!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the advice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty... Let's eat!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nom! Munch, munch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Good golly, this is tasty!

Special Week cleans every plate without even
breaking a sweat.

The crowd floods right into the restaurant. The
publicity campaign is a huge success.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What?! What do you mean you've got nothing?!
choice_data_list:
You'll be fine if you just believe in yourself and
eat like usual.

You'll be fine if you just believe in yourself and
eat like usual.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Really? That's it?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, I'll eat like I always do and enjoy
myself while I'm at it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the advice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty... Let's eat!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nom! Munch, munch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Mmm! Good golly, this is tasty!

Special Week cleans every plate without even
breaking a sweat.

The crowd floods right into the restaurant. The
publicity campaign is a huge success.
